To fix the `TypeError: profileData.community.map is not a function`, I will modify `components/MyProfilePage.tsx`.

The issue stems from the use of `renderInput` within the `profileData.community.map` loop. The `renderInput` helper function assumes it is updating a direct property of an object (like `profileData.education.school_name`). However, when applied to `profileData.community` (which is an array), the generic `handleInputChange` inside `renderInput` spreads the array into an object structure (e.g., `{0: val, 1: val, ...}`), effectively destroying the array type. Subsequent renders then fail because `.map` cannot be called on this plain object.

I will replace the `renderInput` calls inside the Community section with explicit `<input>` elements that use the correct `updateCommunity(index, field, value)` handler, ensuring the array structure is preserved.
